description.unified: Drops 5 lightning bolts upon a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting Electrify. Electrified enemy is stunned for [1.8 sec->3 sec].
HP of all allies is healed by ??? for [6 sec->5 sec]. For the duration of SKill, Kaulah gains immunity to CC and takes [25% reduced Magic DMG->50% reducesd All DMG].
For 15 sec, increases all allies' ATK by ???, ATK Spd by [42%->350], and Crit Chance by [420->350].

Deals ??? M.DMG to 4 enemies every 15 sec, inflicting them with Electric shock for 20 sec, and inflicting stun for [0.6 sec->1 sec] upon a Critical Hit. Enemies inflicted with Electric Shock take a total of ??? M.DMG over 20 sec. For every enemy under Electric, Kaulah takes 15% reduced DMG. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

dark.unified: Target takes [30%->25%] increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Allies take 25% less DMG while skill is in effect.

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, additionally heal allies by 5% of their Max HP.

light.unified: Recovers 1 orb of Mana for all allies.

dark.unified: Upon activation, dispels the target's positive effects if there are 3 or less enemies.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG {0}% boost effect is added.

dark.unified: When taking DMG, decreases ATK Spd of the attacking enemy by 300 for 5 sec and its Mana by 200 every sec. This effect is activated only once every 5 sec.

description.unified: Normal attacks have a {0}% chance to deal M.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and inflicts against 2 random enemies and reduce their ATK by {2}%. If the target is already inflicted with Electric Shock, stuns the target for 2 sec.
